mapper.sql: id, name, name_en, business_object, value_logic, status, data_type, reference_field_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rule_param WHERE delete_flag = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nameEn}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT FROM rule_param WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM rule_param WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_param (name, name_en, business_object, value_logic, status, data_type, reference_field_id, created_by, created_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{name}, #{nameEn}, #{businessObject}, #{valueLogic}, #{status}, #{dataType}, #{referenceFieldId}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE rule_param SET name = #{name}, name_en = #{nameEn}, business_object = #{businessObject}, value_logic = #{valueLogic}, status = #{status}, data_type = #{dataType}, reference_field_id = #{referenceFieldId}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE rule_param SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
